review.reason: Agent-security scanning is directly relevant to prompt/tool injection, repository trust, setup-command abuse, and unsafe agent execution review.
review.action: Perform metadata-first source review: license, provenance, maintenance, behavior surface, install/runtime risk, and reusable safety procedure suitability.

review.reason: MCP server and connector workflows are high-value but require explicit network, filesystem, credential, and external-system mutation boundary review.
review.action: Review as source-profile candidate and identify whether any procedure should remain reference-only, require risk audit, or enter normalization queue.

review.reason: Benchmark and evaluation harnesses can improve validation gates for skills and workflows without copying benchmark content.
review.action: Review license, evaluation shape, failure taxonomy, and whether it can inform acceptance criteria for skill usefulness validation.
